g.text: UoW Data Impact — What Changes at Each Step

ul.li: After step 9: data intact (on data pages)
"Last write wins" may copy data forward
Pages marked dirty in buffer pool
Contains enough info to replay on crash
Deferred: still in ring buffer only
GroupCommit: in ring buffer, WAL writer will flush within interval
Registry: epoch stays Pending until flush
Survives crash: WAL replay restores state
Data pages now on disk (not just WAL)
WAL segment can be recycled (space reclaimed)
